data.body: Done definition update: The closed allowlist in check-tickets-boundary.sh is defined by an explicit enumeration file committed as part of this story (e.g., plugins/dso/hooks/lib/tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf). The file enumerates: (i) ticket-system scripts at plugins/dso/scripts/ticket*; (ii) thin-wrapper scripts retained from stories f3ce-beaf, f05a-0d49, d2c4-5515, dceb-2566 (sprint-next-batch.sh, sprint-list-epics.sh, purge-non-project-tickets.sh, pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh); (iii) plugin hooks that string-match .tickets-tracker/ for guard purposes (pre-bash-functions.sh, pre-edit-write-functions.sh, review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh, compute-diff-hash.sh, deps.sh, record-review.sh, review-gate-allowlist.conf); (iv) .suggestions/ + .review-events/ accessors (suggestion-record.sh, retro-gather.sh, emit-review-event.sh, review-stats.sh, review-stats.py); (v) plugins/dso/docs/ path-scoped exclusion; (vi) test fixtures under tests/fixtures/ and tests/hooks/ via inline suppression comment. SC2 exempts docs/ but NOT hooks/ — hooks that legitimately reference .tickets-tracker/ as part of their guard logic (e.g., pre-bash-functions.sh:763) MUST be included in the allowlist or the hook will self-block the plugin's enforcement layer. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
